series_metadata.series_description: Annual reports that are required by the Ohio Revised Code, plus any other reports published or requested regarding agency activities

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Convert to electronic format. Archive copy to be forwarded to State Archives. Fulfill requirements of O.R.C. 149.11. Destroy excess copies when no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Fulfill requirements of O.R.C. 149.11, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
